mapper.sql: id, project_id, file_id, source_file_hash, source_content_type, parse_type, result_format, parser_provider, parser_model, status, progress, current_stage, result_object_name, result_file_id, content_preview, error_message, metadata, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into file_parse_record ( project_id, file_id, source_file_hash, source_content_type, parse_type, result_format, parser_provider, parser_model, status, progress, current_stage, metadata, deleted ) values ( #{projectId}, #{fileId}, #{sourceFileHash}, #{sourceContentType}, #{parseType}, #{resultFormat}, #{parserProvider}, #{parserModel}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{currentStage}, #{metadata}, 0 )
mapper.select: select from file_parse_record where id = #{recordId} and deleted = 0
select from file_parse_record where project_id = #{projectId} and file_id = #{fileId} and deleted = 0 order by created_at desc, id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update file_parse_record set status = 'RUNNING', current_stage = #{stage}, progress = #{progress}, started_at = coalesce(started_at, current_timestamp), updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{recordId} and deleted = 0

update file_parse_record set status = 'SUCCESS', progress = 100, current_stage = #{currentStage}, result_object_name = #{resultObjectName}, result_file_id = #{resultFileId}, content_preview = #{contentPreview}, error_message = null, metadata = #{metadata}, finished_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted = 0

update file_parse_record set status = 'FAILED', current_stage = #{stage}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{recordId} and deleted = 0
